title: US Supreme Court strikes down Trump order restricting birthright citizenship
description: The US Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump's order limiting birthright citizenship and reaffirmed citizenship for nearly all children born in America.

title: Days before his murder Ketan suspected Siya had affair with someone else
description: Police said Ketan believed Siya was involved with someone else and often complained that her phone was busy whenever he called.

title: Ethanol mixing an experiment results by next year
description: The government informed the Supreme Court that the 20% ethanol blending policy will continue while supply depends on demand.

title: Siya Goyal's lawyer sues her brother for Rs 10 crore
description: Advocate Aashutosh Srivastava issued a Rs 10 crore defamation notice against Sahil Goyal over alleged false statements.

title: POK is not part of Pakistan Thousands rally against Islamabad
description: Thousands protested in Rawalakot against Pakistan's food blockade and administrative control.

title: Only AC government buses in Tamil Nadu from now
description: Tamil Nadu government announced that only AC buses will be purchased for public transport.

title: PM chairs 4-hour meeting with top bureaucrats
description: Prime Minister reviewed government priorities with senior bureaucrats and emphasized deregulation and self-reliance.

title: IMD forecasts below-normal rainfall in July
description: The IMD predicted below-normal rainfall due to strengthening El Niño conditions.

title: US Supreme Court upholds bans on trans women in female sports
description: The Supreme Court allowed states to enforce bans on transgender women competing in female school and college sports.

title: Tata Sierra EV launched at Rs 18.79 lakh
description: Tata Motors launched the Sierra EV with a claimed range of up to 665 km.
